# Extração: 05-10X Statistics - Statistic Management Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-10X Statistics - Statistic Management Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 2.53 MB

---

Make a master list of all important statistics
• Include sales, leads, traffic, team, finance, etc
Decide which statistics are your critical KPIs
• Start tracking your KPIs immediately!
Decide on timelines (ex: Sunday at midnight)
Get clear on the best sources for all data
• Can include online and offline sources
Make list of Conversions you need to set up
• Review Google standard Conversions list
Create structure for UTM tracking (optional)
Decide how you will collect and display stats
• Either in Google Sheets or Data Studio
Plan for tech setup and hire someone if needed
Create strategy for reporting if done manually
STATISTICS STRATEGY
Collect data daily or weekly (if not automated)
Schedule regular meetings to review dashboards
• Notice significant trends over previous reports
Make adjusts based on good, bad or non-existent
• Always create a definitive list of action items
Keep a note log that reflects adjustments made
STATISTICS REPORTING
